---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug or unexpected behavior
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Bug

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages if any.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain the issue.

## Environment

- **Splunk Version**: (e.g., 9.3.1)
- **Whitelist Manager Version**: (e.g., 2.0.0, check in Apps > Manage Apps)
- **Browser**: (e.g., Chrome 120, Firefox 121)
- **OS**: (e.g., Windows 11, Ubuntu 22.04)
- **User Role**: (e.g., wl_analyst_editor, wl_admin)

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem — relevant Splunk logs, `wl_manager_audit.log` entries, etc.
